name: Calculateur Permutations
desc: Calculez P(n,k) = n! / (n-k)!. Exemple: How many ways to arrange 3 books from a shelf of 5? = P(5,3) = 60. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.

mistakes: Utiliser r plus grand que n
